skills.label: Polynomial/rational analysis and modeling
skills.description: Practice and review: Polynomial and Rational Functions. Topics include Change in linear and quadratic models; Polynomial rates of change and end behavior; Zeros, factors, and multiplicity.

skills.label: Exp/log equations and contextual models
skills.description: Practice and review: Exponential and Logarithmic Functions. Topics include Exponential growth and decay models; Composition and inverse relationships; Logarithmic scales and change of base.

skills.label: Trigonometric/polar representation and graphs
skills.description: Practice and review: Trigonometric and Polar Functions. Topics include Periodic phenomena and sinusoidal models; Radian measure and unit circle; Sinusoidal transformations and inverse trig.

skills.label: Parametric, vector, and matrix modeling
skills.description: Practice and review: Functions Involving Parameters, Vectors, and Matrices. Topics include Parametric functions and motion models; Vectors in the plane; Matrix operations and transformations.
